prompt: Create an executive dashboard for a regional logistics company. Show on-time delivery, cost per shipment, active exceptions, carrier performance, and a twelve-week trend. Use realistic embedded data. Deliver one self-contained HTML file.

Create a board-ready narrative brief explaining a decline in customer retention. Include an executive conclusion, cohort evidence, annotated figures, three recommendations, sources, and print-ready formatting. Deliver one self-contained HTML file.

Create a seven-section quarterly business review presentation for a B2B software company. Support keyboard navigation, visible progress, one conclusion per section, and print-to-PDF. Use realistic embedded data and deliver one self-contained HTML file.

Create an incident operations console with search, severity and owner filters, an incident queue, service health, an activity timeline, and designed loading, empty, partial-data, and error states. Deliver one self-contained HTML file.
